title: Allowing public network access to cloud resources is security-sensitive
description: Exposing cloud resources to public network access increases the attack surface and risk of unauthorized access, data breaches, or service disruption. Resources should be deployed in private subnets when possible, with controlled access through load balancers, NAT gateways, or VPN connections.
recommendation: Deploy resources in private subnets instead of public ones. Use private subnets with NAT gateways for outbound internet access, and load balancers or API gateways for controlled inbound access.
impact: Increased attack surface, potential data breaches, and unauthorized access to cloud resources

checks.message: Avoid exposing cloud resources to public network access. Use private subnets and controlled access methods like load balancers or API gateways instead.
